About Me

Hi, I'm Puxazh.

I'm a freelance video editor with a passion for the craft of visual storytelling. Every project I take on is treated with the precision and intentionality of a director — because I believe that great editing is invisible, yet unforgettable.

My workflow combines technical mastery with creative intuition. I don't just cut clips together — I sculpt emotion, pace, and narrative. Whether it's a 30-second Instagram Reel or a cinematic brand film, I approach every frame with purpose.

"Every second counts. I specialize in content that keeps audiences watching until the very last frame."

Expertise

Skills & Tools

Proficient in industry-leading software with a refined eye for pacing, color, and storytelling. Every tool serves the vision.

01
Precision Cutting
Frame-accurate editing with a mastery of pacing, rhythm, and narrative flow. Every cut is intentional.
02
Color Grading
Cinematic color work that sets the emotional tone — from moody desaturated films to vibrant social content.
03
Motion & Transitions
Dynamic transitions, animated text, and motion graphics that elevate raw footage to polished productions.
04
Sound Design
Music selection, SFX layering, and audio balancing to create an immersive sensory experience.
05
Short-Form Mastery
Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts — content engineered to hook, retain, and convert viewers.
06
Brand Storytelling
Translating brand identity into visual language — promotional videos that build trust and drive action.

What I Offer

My Services

🎬
Cinematic Video Editing
Full-scale video editing for brand films, documentary-style content, and long-form productions with a cinematic feel.
  • Color grading & LUTs
  • Sound mixing & SFX
  • Title cards & credits
  • Delivery in 4K/1080p
📱
Short-Form Content
Scroll-stopping Reels, TikToks, and Shorts engineered for maximum retention and engagement.
  • Hook-optimized openers
  • Trending transitions
  • Caption & subtitle styling
  • Platform-specific sizing
📣
Promotional Videos
High-converting promotional and advertising videos for products, events, brands, and campaigns.
  • Ad-ready formats
  • CTA integration
  • Brand consistency
  • Revision rounds included
"

Great editing is the invisible art that makes everything else look effortless.

Why Choose Me

The Difference
You'll Feel

  • 01
    Director's Perspective
    I don't just edit — I think in narrative. Every project gets a story structure that serves your audience's emotions and your business goals.
  • 02
    Fast, Reliable Delivery
    Deadlines are sacred. I maintain transparent timelines and deliver on time — every time — without sacrificing quality.
  • 03
    Results-Oriented Editing
    Every edit decision is made with your outcome in mind — whether that's views, conversions, brand perception, or pure emotional impact.
  • 04
    Clear Communication
    You're never left guessing. I keep you informed at every stage, welcome feedback, and revise until you're fully satisfied.
How I Work

The Process

01
Discovery
We discuss your project goals, target audience, style references, and timeline.
02
Raw Edit
I structure and assemble a first cut, establishing pacing and story flow.
03
Refinement
Color grading, sound design, motion graphics, and feedback revisions.
04
Delivery
Final export in your required format, resolution, and platform specs. Done.
